full_text:
Lady Fan 樊氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Fan (樊氏). Window to dead brother of Zhao Fan. Zhao Yun declined to receive her in marriage from Fan. Lady Fan was affiliated with Zhao Fan and the Shu Kingdom.
